name: Trombone Champ: Unflattened!
summary: You are a Tromboner… It’s finally time to step up and fulfill your destiny in Trombone Champ: Unflattened! A rhythm game where every note, slide and triumphant toot is yours to command. With more than 50 unforgettable tracks, campaign mode, collectible Tromboner Cards, and wild trombones with unique sounds to unlock, you’re not just playing along with the music—you’re creating it!
